Metadata.title: LK Gloss & Detail | Mobile Car Detailing
Metadata.description: Mobile car care & vehicle detailing with AI-powered analysis. Professional car detailing service in Germany.

hero.title: Premium Car Care & Detailing in Perfection.
hero.subtitle: Professional mobile car detailing with AI-powered analysis. We bring your car to shine right at your doorstep.
hero.imageAlt: Professional car detailing — black Porsche being polished

servicesPreview.title: Our Services
servicesPreview.description: Professional car care right at your doorstep

mobileService.title: Mobile Service
mobileService.description: We come directly to your home or workplace. No need for a shuttle service — professional car care at your doorstep.

aiValuation.title: Increase Your Resale Value.
aiValuation.description: Our AI analyzes your vehicle's condition and creates a personalized detailing plan. Professional care pays off.

whyLK.title: Why LK Gloss & Detail?
whyLK.mobileDesc: We come to your home or workplace

b2b.title: B2B & Fleet Management
b2b.subtitle: Professional car care for businesses and fleets
b2b.description: Offer your employees or customers premium vehicle care. We work with companies, dealerships, leasing companies, car rental agencies, and fleet managers.

contracts.title: Long-term Contracts
contracts.desc: Flexible agreements tailored to your needs

error.message: Failed to load database statistics. Please verify database connection and that RLS migrations have been applied.

overview.title: Dashboard Overview
overview.text: This admin panel allows you to monitor and manage all aspects of the LK Gloss & Detail website. In the next phases of development, you will be able to review booking calendars, modify service pricing tiers, and train the AI chatbot with new knowledge database entries directly.

appointments.title: Appointments & Booking Calendar
appointments.subtitle: Manage incoming bookings, update appointment statuses, and block unavailable calendar slots.
appointments.searchPlaceholder: Search by client name, email, phone, car, or date...

block.title: Blocked Dates
block.subtitle: Prevent bookings on specific calendar days
